rules.title: Azure Policy governance is not evidenced
rules.failureMessage: The submission does not evidence Azure Policy assignments, initiatives, deny controls, diagnostics policies, or tag enforcement.
rules.recommendation: Document policy initiatives, assignments, exemptions, and compliance ownership. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cloud-adoption-framework/govern/policy-compliance/.

rules.title: Landing zone organization is not evidenced
rules.failureMessage: The submission does not evidence management group hierarchy, subscription vending, platform landing zones, or workload landing zone placement.
rules.recommendation: Document ALZ management groups, subscription organization, and platform/application landing zones. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/cloud-adoption-framework/ready/landing-zone/.

rules.title: Cost model and budget guardrails are not evidenced
rules.failureMessage: The submission does not evidence cost estimates, budgets, alerts, tagging, or FinOps ownership.
rules.recommendation: Document cost estimates, budget alerts, tagging, and FinOps governance. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/well-architected/cost-optimization/.

rules.title: Right-sizing rationale is not evidenced
rules.failureMessage: The design does not evidence SKU sizing, autoscale economics, reserved capacity, or utilization assumptions.
rules.recommendation: Document SKU sizing rationale, autoscale assumptions, and reservation/savings analysis. See https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/well-architected/cost-optimization/design-review-checklist.
